email_body:
Beste mevrouw/meneer,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Marketing & Communication bij Elite Events. Uw oproep sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in digitale marketing, contentcreatie en social media.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het beheren van WordPress-websites. Daarnaast beheer ik social media-integraties en analyseer ik prestaties met tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush. Mijn eigen project mirook.com heeft mij geleerd hoe ik gestructureerde data en GEO toepas om zichtbaarheid te verbeteren.

Ik combineer een technische achtergrond met een creatieve, detailgerichte aanpak. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren).

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn vaardigheden in te zetten voor Elite Events. Helaas kan ik niet via e-mail solliciteren; ik zal uw platform gebruiken. Alvast bedankt voor uw overweging.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Marketing & Communication Internship at Elite Events. Your vacancy closely matches my experience in digital marketing, content creation, and social media.

At Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and managing WordPress websites. I also handle social media integrations and analyze performance with tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. My own project mirook.com taught me how to apply structured data and GEO to improve visibility.

I combine a technical background with a creative, detail-oriented approach. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons to improve).

I look forward to contributing my skills to Elite Events. Unfortunately, I cannot apply via email; I will use your platform. Thank you for your consideration.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste selectiecommissie,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Marketing & Communication Intern bij Elite Events. Uw oproep voor een creatieve, detailgerichte stagiair met affiniteit voor digitale marketing en contentcreatie sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik dagelijks bezig met het ontwikkelen en uitvoeren van marketingstrategieën. Ik schrijf keyword-gerichte blogcontent, beheer sociale media-integraties en optimaliseer websites voor zoekmachines. Daarnaast analyseer ik prestaties met Google Analytics, Search Console en SEMrush, en rapporteer ik over resultaten. Deze ervaring heeft mij een solide basis gegeven in contentcreatie, brandingconsistentie en datagedreven besluitvorming.

Mijn eigen project mirook.com heeft mijn vaardigheden in visuele content en merkcommunicatie versterkt. Ik ontwierp de website, creëerde sociale media-content en zorgde voor een consistente uitstraling. Ook heb ik ervaring met Canva en AI-tools voor contentproductie.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Elite Events is de dynamische evenementenomgeving. Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig te werken, maar ook om samen te werken met teams. Mijn technische achtergrond helpt mij om snel nieuwe tools eigen te maken. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren).

Ik ben ervan overtuigd dat ik met mijn combinatie van technische kennis, creativiteit en oog voor detail een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan uw team. Ik hoop de kans te krijgen om mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Selection Committee,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Marketing & Communication Internship at Elite Events. Your call for a creative, detail-oriented intern with affinity for digital marketing and content creation closely matches my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am daily involved in developing and executing marketing strategies. I write keyword-targeted blog content, manage social media integrations, and optimize websites for search engines. Additionally, I analyze performance with Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush, and report on results. This experience has given me a solid foundation in content creation, brand consistency, and data-driven decision-making.

My own project mirook.com has strengthened my skills in visual content and brand communication. I designed the website, created social media content, and ensured a consistent look and feel. I also have experience with Canva and AI tools for content production.

What attracts me to Elite Events is the dynamic event environment. I am used to working independently but also collaborating with teams. My technical background helps me quickly master new tools. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons to improve).

I am convinced that with my combination of technical knowledge, creativity, and attention to detail, I can make a valuable contribution to your team. I hope to have the opportunity to further explain my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Content creation: writing SEO blog posts, newsletters, and social media content for websites and brands
- Social media management: content scheduling, integration, and engagement tracking (Instagram, LinkedIn)
- Digital marketing tools: Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads, Canva
- Brand consistency and visual content: designed website and social media visuals for mirook.com
- Independent and team-oriented: experience working remotely at Episto and collaborating with cross-functional teams
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Social Media
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, social media management, and digital marketing strategy. At Episto, I write SEO-optimized blog content, manage social media integrations, and track performance with analytics tools. On my own project (mirook.com), I created visual content, managed brand communication, and improved online visibility. Comfortable with Canva, WordPress, and AI-assisted content tools. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Social media: content creation, scheduling, engagement, analytics (Instagram, LinkedIn)
- Digital marketing tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Design & visual: Canva, responsive web design, AI-assisted content tools
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Manage social media integrations and ensure consistent brand messaging across platforms
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide content and marketing decisions
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, Content & Social Media (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Created visual content (posts, flyers) and wrote blog posts to promote the brand
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
